name: MINDEX All-Life ETL (GBIF iNat kingdom rotation)

parameters.command: cd /home/mycosoft/mindex && set -a && [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a && python -m mindex_etl.jobs.run_all_kingdoms --skip-backfill 2>&1 | tee -a /var/log/mindex_all_life_ingest.log

nodes.name: RunAllKingdomsOnMindexHost
nodes.notes: Point SSH/Execute to MAS or MINDEX host where mindex repo + venv live. Adjust path. Per-kingdom slicing: set env MINDEX_KINGDOM_SLICE in future job versions.
